title: Year 10 Technology: Cultural Mapping Exercise
subject: Technology
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of technology concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern technology challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through technology frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on technology issues
activities: Traditional knowledge workshop and technology integration
Community interview project on technology applications
Cultural artifact study through technology lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and technology resources
Traditional knowledge holders and technology experts
Environmental monitoring tools and technology software
Community engagement platforms and technology forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and technology models
assessment: Cultural competency evaluation through technology projects
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
